description: The 'Crypto Bowl' in 2022 featured major exchanges like Coinbase and FTX. The high-budget blitz was met with intense public skepticism given the volatility of the asset class.

key_events.description: Super Bowl LVI airing causes immediate massive app downloads followed by backlash.
Financial analysts question the wisdom of speculative advertising for retail investors.
Regulatory warnings issued regarding crypto advertising standards.
Market downturn cements the public view that these ads were 'hype-driven'.

calibration_notes: Models the relationship between aggressive marketing spend and public trust in high-risk sectors.
